name: Skill Knight
author: Poki
description: Skill Knight is an adventure where a little knight explores a magical world full of wonder. As he journeys around, he gathers materials and unlocks new abilities, literally walking along his own growing skill tree as the path expands with every upgrade. Discover new powers, enjoy the peaceful exploration, and see how far your skills can take you. Just be careful… you might awaken an ancient dragon. Ready to explore and grow stronger? How to play Skill Knight? Use WASD, the arrow keys or the joystick to move. Who created Skill Knight? Skill Knight is created by Resurrected Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Royal Flush Merge ! How can I play Skill Knight for free? You can play Skill Knight for free on Poki. Can I play Skill Knight on mobile devices and desktop? Skill Knight can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
